calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hellman for Jack Chu. Jackson Chu also present.

The Court approved the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Continued To Sep-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Continued To Aug-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hellman for Jack Chu (Administrator).

The Court stated that the further decalration provided does not address the property issue, that including the property in the inventory does not make it part of the Estate and that there is a problem with the chain of title. The accounting petition was continued to August 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to determine how to proceed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Continued To Jul-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hellman for Jack Chu.

The Court stated that it has not points and authorities filed this morning. Mr. Hellman stated that the Family had done various transfers of the property that were never recorded, that it was an error of the Parents of never adding the Sister's name back on title and that he can bring in testimony if needed. In addition, Mr. Hellman stated that the Siblings state that the intent of the Father was that all three Children be on title, that he could obtain declarations from them and that statments were attached to the original petition. The matter was continued to July 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it would be helpful to have evidence as to what the Decedent's intent was.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jun-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
